title: SEC1: notify_closure leak on set_event_callback
description: wasm/src/client.rs:250 — wire_notify_callback() calls notify_closure.forget() every time it is called. set_event_callback() (which calls wire_notify_callback) can be called multiple times (e.g. after reconnect). Each call leaks the previous Closure permanently — there is no drop path. Fix: store the Closure in a field on NieRelayClient instead of calling forget(); replace it on each set_event_callback call so the old Closure drops cleanly.
close_reason: duplicate of nie-7bv6.28: same notify_closure forget() leak issue, SEC0 filing is more complete and higher priority
